commit.message:
Add ML performance improvements & homomorphic encryption implementation

- Created HE.ipynb with 12-cell comprehensive ML pipeline
- Implemented 4 optimized models with hyperparameter tuning
- Added SMOTE for class imbalance handling (+38% minority class samples)
- Integrated Paillier homomorphic encryption (2048-bit, privacy-preserving)
- Random Forest: 74.03% accuracy with F1-Score 0.6581
- Encrypted training: 76.25% accuracy maintaining full data privacy
- Created ml_he_pipeline.py for reproducible execution
- Added ML_IMPROVEMENTS.md with performance analysis
- Added ENCRYPTED_DATA_FLOW.md with security architecture

Key improvements:
- Data preprocessing: handled missing values & scaling
- Multiple models: Logistic Regression, Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, SVM
- 5-fold cross-validation with GridSearchCV
- Comprehensive metrics: Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1, ROC-AUC
- Privacy-preserving workflow: homomorphic encryption enables secure training

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

변경 사항:
1. _config.yml: 프로젝트 중심 네비게이션 구조 재정의
   - YouTube Shorts Automation (프로젝트 1 + 5개 세부 문서)

   - About (자기소개 페이지)

2. index.md: 간소화 (프로젝트 카드 3장 + 빠른 링크)
   - 30초 규칙 충족 (리크루터 친화적)
   - 핵심 프로젝트만 상단에 배치

3. 새 페이지 추가:
   - youtube-shorts-overview.md (프로젝트 1 상세 소개)
   - mcp-server-overview.md (프로젝트 2 상세 소개)
   - about.md (자기소개 + 기술 스택 + 연락처)

4. STRUCTURE_ANALYSIS.md: 구조 재설계 분석 보고서

개선 효과:
✅ 정보 계층 명확화 (프로젝트 > 세부 문서)
✅ 내부 링크 강화 (문서 간 연결)
✅ 리크루터 접근성 (홈페이지에서 핵심 파악)
✅ 카테고리 분리 (프로젝트 vs 학습 자료 구분)

commit.message:
fix(jetson): auto-fill Supabase credentials from repo .env files

Step 8 now reads SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY from repo root
.env or .env.development (committed, public keys) before falling back
to interactive prompt. This means a fresh clone + sudo ./setup_jetson.sh
works without any manual credential entry.

Priority order:
1. Already in config.json (sync_env.py ran on dev machine)
2. Auto-detect from repo .env / .env.development (new)
3. Environment variables (CI/CD)
4. Interactive prompt (provisioning token / manual / skip)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(jetson): harden setup script against all failure modes

- Step 6: Add curl to system packages (needed for model download in step 9)
- Step 8: Create config.json if missing (no repo file AND no example)
  Wrap provisioning in set +e so failure doesn't abort entire setup
- Step 9: Use CFG_SUPA_URL/KEY to avoid env var collision; remove hard
  exit 1 for missing config — warn and continue instead
  Add 2>/dev/null to curl/stat to prevent set -e crash
- Step 10: Check trtexec exists before attempting conversion; wrap in
  set +e so conversion failure doesn't abort setup
- Step 12: Check /usr/share/applications exists before creating shortcut
  (headless Jetson may not have desktop directory)

All non-blocking failures now warn and continue instead of aborting.
Only 2 hard exits remain: non-ARM64 abort and missing Docker.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Upgrade HTTP endpoints to HTTPS in Azure App Service (#16060)

* Upgrade HTTP endpoints to HTTPS in Azure App Service

HTTP endpoints are now upgraded to HTTPS:443 by default in App Service,
matching the existing behavior in Azure Container Apps. App Service already
redirects HTTP to HTTPS at the platform level, so this ensures connection
strings reflect the actual serving scheme.

- Add PreserveHttpEndpoints property to AzureAppServiceEnvironmentResource
- Add WithHttpsUpgrade() extension method to opt out
- Upgrade HTTP->HTTPS in ProcessEndpoints with consolidated logging
- Add CanPreserveHttpSchemeUsingWithHttpsUpgrade test

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add remarks and example to WithHttpsUpgrade XML docs

Mirror the ACA WithHttpsUpgrade documentation pattern with remarks
explaining opt-out behavior and a usage example.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix CanPreserveHttpSchemeUsingWithHttpsUpgrade test to verify endpoint URLs

Add a second project that references project1 so the snapshot captures
the resolved endpoint URLs (services__project1__http__0). This proves
WithHttpsUpgrade(false) actually preserves http:// scheme instead of
upgrading to https://.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix Metaculus: use continuous_range quantile array for P(date < cutoff)

The v3 API returns possibilities.continuous_range: a 201-point array of ISO
date strings representing the inverse CDF (quantile function) of the community
forecast. Replaced broken aggregations-based approach with binary search +
interpolation on this array.

feat(plugin): add Copilot CLI plugin support

Add native `marketplace.json` and `plugin/plugin.json` manifests so `copilot plugin marketplace add` and `copilot plugin install` work without relying on Claude-specific fallback paths. Wire Copilot session hooks through `plugin/hooks/copilot.json` and document the shared plugin flow in `README.md`, `plugin/README.md`, and `cmd/auto.go`.

Keep `Claude Code` on `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` and `plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json` so both CLIs can share the `plugin/` package without sharing incompatible hook schemas. Update `release-please-config.json` so plugin version bumps keep the Copilot manifest in sync.

DeepAnalysisModal.tsx into src/components/DeepAnalysisModal/:

- ModalHeader: stock name, badges, quick stats panel

commit.message:
Authentic Japanese design overhaul

Redesign the entire UI with authentic Japanese design principles:

- Ma (): Generous whitespace, breathing room in all layouts
- Kanso (): Simplified UI, removed emoji icons, cleaner typography
- Shibui (): Understated elegance with subtle, refined details
- Wabi-sabi (): Natural, imperfect beauty in the design language

Color palette: Traditional Japanese  ai indigo (#2C4A7C),colors
kinari warm white (#F7F4EF), sumi ink (#1A1A2E), wakakusa green,
urushi lacquer red. All semantic status colors updated.

Typography: Added Noto Serif JP for headings and Japanese text,
paired with Geist Sans for body. Bilingual micro-labels throughout.

Layout: Asymmetric grid compositions, editorial-style sections,
vertical dividers, sticky side navigation. Moved from centered
marketing-card patterns to editorial Japanese product feel.

Components: Refined header with roofline mark, seigaiha wave
pattern footer, softer card borders, ichimoji dividers, gentle
300ms+ transitions, traditional gradient placeholders.

Inspired by Muji, Monocle Japan, and high-end Japanese real estate.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Scroll to top when advancing to next group in results reveal (#23)

When revealing results group-by-group, the page position wasn't reset
between groups, leaving users scrolled mid-page after advancing.

## Change

- `results-reveal.tsx`: call `window.scrollTo(0, 0)` alongside the state
increment in the "Reveal next group" button's `onClick`

```tsx
onClick={() => { setRevealedCount((c) => c + 1); window.scrollTo(0, 0); }}
```

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
User/yashasg/brower client (#18)

* fix: enable keyboard input and fix canvas scaling for WASM builds

- Add PLATFORM_WEB as PUBLIC define on shapeshifter_lib for Emscripten
  so gesture_system.cpp (compiled in the lib) sees the flag
- Change #ifdef PLATFORM_DESKTOP to include PLATFORM_WEB for keyboard
  fields (input.h), key reading (input_system), and key→gesture
  translation (gesture_system)
- Fix HTML shell: add max-width/max-height + object-fit:contain so the
  720×1280 canvas scales to fit the viewport instead of overflowing
- Change canvas tabindex from -1 to 0 and auto-focus on load/click so
  keyboard and mouse events are received reliably

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: rename WASM output to index.html and add responsive canvas layout

- Set OUTPUT_NAME to 'index' for Emscripten so the build produces
  index.html (servers serve this by default)
- Mobile (touch devices): canvas fills the full screen with
  object-fit:contain
- Desktop (pointer devices): canvas scales to viewport height with
  fixed 9:16 aspect ratio, centered horizontally
- Disable all scrolling on both platforms (overflow:hidden,
  touch-action:none, touchmove preventDefault)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* ci: deploy WASM build to GitHub Pages on main push

- Fix artifact paths from shapeshifter.* to index.* (matches
  OUTPUT_NAME change)
- Add deploy job that runs after successful build on main branch
- Uses actions/upload-pages-artifact + actions/deploy-pages for
  static site deployment
- Only deploys on push to main (skipped for PRs)

Note: GitHub Pages must be configured to deploy from GitHub Actions
in the repository Settings > Pages > Source.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: readability pass — deduplicate code and unify platform macros

Consolidate duplicated code into shared headers:

- enum_names.h: canonical shape_name(), obstacle_kind_name(),
  timing_tier_name() — replaces 6 static copies across 3 files
- platform.h: single PLATFORM_HAS_KEYBOARD macro — replaces
  scattered #if defined(PLATFORM_DESKTOP) || defined(PLATFORM_WEB)
- platform_utils.h: safe_localtime(), safe_fopen() — replaces
  identical #ifdef _WIN32 wrappers in file_logger.cpp,
  session_logger.cpp, and main.cpp

Extract tick_fixed_systems() in main.cpp so the 18-system loop is
defined once instead of copy-pasted across native and Emscripten paths.

Remove unused SwipeGesture::Tap enum value (never referenced).

Net: -111 lines, zero behavior change, all 383 tests pass.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: implement architecture improvements from DoD review

1. Split rhythm.h into three headers by access pattern:
   - beat_map.h: loaded-once data (BeatEntry, BeatMap) — includes <string>, <vector>
   - song_state.h: runtime singletons (SongState, HPState, SongResults)
   - rhythm.h: per-entity components (TimingGrade, BeatInfo) + timing helpers
   rhythm.h re-exports both for backward compatibility.

2. Extract begin_shape_window() in player_action_system to eliminate
   the duplicated 9-line window-init block (Idle and Active+different
   branches were identical).

3. Extract scene-draw helpers from render_system (456→~450 lines but
   now 5 focused functions): draw_title_scene, draw_hud,
   draw_game_over_overlay, draw_song_complete_overlay, draw_pause_overlay.

4. Move enter_playing() into setup_play_session() (play_session.h/cpp),
   separating entity construction from the game state machine.

5. Single-pass collision: replace 5 separate entt::view iterations with
   one view + switch on Obstacle::kind. Simpler code, one iteration.

All 383 tests pass, zero behavior change.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: split PlayerShape into PlayerShape + ShapeWindow

PlayerShape (12B) now holds only render-path data: current, previous,
morph_t. ShapeWindow (28B) holds rhythm-mode timing data: target_shape,
phase_raw, window_timer, window_start, peak_time, window_scale, graded.

Systems that only need the current shape (render_system,
player_movement_system) no longer pull in 28 bytes of window timing
data. Systems that manage the window (shape_window_system,
collision_system, player_action_system) query both components.

Also removed spurious PlayerShape from burnout_system's view — it
queried the component but never read any field from it.

All 383 tests pass (803 assertions).
